question_text: Let 𝑋 be a random variable with probability density function 𝑓(𝑥; 𝜆) = { 𝜆𝑒− 𝑥 𝜆 𝑖𝑓 𝑥> 0 0 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟𝑤𝑖𝑠𝑒, where 𝜆> 0 is an unknown parameter. Let 𝑌1, 𝑌2, … , 𝑌𝑛 be a random sample of size 𝑛 from a population having the same distribution as 𝑋2. If 𝑌̅ = 𝑖=1 , then which one of the following statements is true?

options.A: √𝑌̅ 2 is a method of moments estimator of 𝜆
options.B: √𝑌̅ is a method of moments estimator of 𝜆
options.C: 2 √𝑌̅ is a method of moments estimator of 𝜆
options.D: 2√𝑌̅ is a method of moments estimator of 𝜆
